title: 这条 prompt 适合用于高端设计师玩具或限量版收藏品的营销场景，能够吸引对品质和独特性有高要求的消费者。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 适合用于高端设计师玩具或限量版收藏品的营销场景，能够吸引对品质和独特性有高要求的消费者。
prompt_original: 2x2 grid, do this for 4 famous scientists in history: Design a collector-grade launch visual for [TOY / FIGURE / DESIGNER OBJECT] shown in pristine hero form along with interchangeable accessories, alternate expressions, packaging design, scale references, sticker details, rarity indicators, and close-up material highlights. The object should feel like a luxury drop, somewhere between art toy culture and elite product branding.  Accessory Layout: Arrange [ACCESSORY 1], [ACCESSORY 2], [ALT VERSION], [PACKAGING FEATURE], and [LIMITED EDITION DETAIL] around the figure in carefully staged clusters. Everything should feel desirable, neat, and “unboxable.”  Visual Style: Hype-culture collectible reveal meets premium e-commerce launch campaign. Clean, glossy, tactile, designer-toy sophistication with a playful but expensive sensibility.  Composition Guidelines: Hero figure remains dominant. Accessories should be balanced and elegantly spaced. Packaging should be visible but not steal the scene. The entire image should feel like a product collectors would screenshot instantly.  Lighting & Background: Soft commercial lighting with subtle specular highlights, polished background in [BACKGROUND STYLE], crisp shadows, premium color separation, ultra-sharp details, no watermark.
prompt_zh: 2x2网格，为4位著名历史科学家设计一款收藏级的发布视觉效果：展示一个完美的英雄形态的[玩具/手办/设计师物件]，并附带可更换的配件、替换表情、包装设计、比例参考、贴纸细节、稀有度指示和特写材料亮点。该物件应给人一种奢华感，介于艺术玩具文化和高端产品品牌之间。 配件布局：将[配件1]、[配件2]、[替代版本]、[包装特色]和[限量版细节]围绕着手办精心布置成集群。所有东西都应显得令人向往、整洁且“可开箱”。 视觉风格：潮流文化收藏品揭幕与高端电子商务发布活动相结合。干净、光亮、触感良好，具有设计师玩具的精致感，同时兼具玩味性和昂贵感。 构图指南：主要手办保持主导地位。配件应平衡且优雅地分布。包装应可见但不抢镜。整个图像应让人感觉是收藏家会立即截图的产品。 灯光与背景：柔和的商业灯光，带有微妙的高光，背景采用[背景风格]，清晰的阴影，高级色彩分离，超清晰细节，无水印。
